item.title: Welcome to the .NET Developers Austria
item.description: The DotNetDevs.at is an association, which activities are not about gaining profit, it’s purpose is to spread knowledge and experience about the usage of .NET technologies. Our goals are: make it easier for new participants to find existing communities offer existing members more choice promote the exchange between the different communities We are thanking our sponsors:

item.title: OGS is new Sponsor & Videorecordings
item.description: If you attended one of the last meetups, you already noticed it. Since January we have OGS Software & Services as sponsor. This helps us to improve our infrastructure and our events for the future. The recordings of our lasts meetups are now online: Introduction to Open Source Uno Platform for cross-platform development The hidden gems of the .NET ecosystem Have fun with watching them!

item.title: Microsoft Is a New Sponsor!
item.description: We are happy to announce that we have a new Sponsor! Starting with November Microsoft is sponsoring our non- profit- organisation. This helps us to improve our infrastructure and our events for the future. Big thanks specially to Christian Schwendtner for making this possible!

item.title: What is The Clean Architecture and how you would build one in .NET?
item.description: The recording of the talk “What is The Clean Architecture and how you would build one in .NET?” by Ian Cooper is now on YouTube at https://youtu.be/efD2-GO50io available. Links of the Talk: Brighter at GitHub: https://github.com/BrighterCommand/Brighter All Slides from Ian Cooper: https://github.com/iancooper/Presentations Ian Cooper at Twitter: https://twitter.com/ICooper

item.title: Show and tell of Visual Studio & Visual Studio Code extensions hidden gems
item.description: The recording of the talk “Show and tell of Visual Studio & Visual Studio Code extensions hidden gems” by Martin, Andreas and Raoul is now on YouTube at https://youtu.be/daOE-iWeNm8 available. Here is the list of the shown Visual Studio and Visual Studio Code extensions: VS Extensions Resharper Tweaks Presentation Mode is back!!! Productivity Power Tools 2017/2019 Extensionpack with a lot of nice extensions: Fix Mixed Tabs PowerCommands Shrink Emtpy Lines (negative Effect) Markdown Editor Add New File

item.title: Real-Time Serverless Apps with .NET, Azure Functions and Azure SignalR by Rainer Stropek
item.description: The recording of the talk “Real-Time Serverless Apps with .NET, Azure Functions and Azure SignalR” by Rainer Stropek is now on YouTube at https://youtu.be/TvLABG6Cl3Y available. Rainers recording is available here. The Code- Samples can be found on GitHub at https://github.com/rstropek/Samples/tree/master/AsyncBlazor./

item.title: EF Core Hidden gems by Igor Rončević
item.description: The recording of the talk “EF Core Hidden gems” by Igor Rončević is now on YouTube at https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rjwou1Nw8Bk available. The Code- Samples can be found on GitHub at https://github.com/ironcev-talks/entity-framework-core-hidden-gems./

item.title: Streaming
item.description: Since some .NET Meetups we are streaming on Twitch.tv. The recordings are with a little delay on our YouTube- Channel to find.

item.title: Hello World!
item.description: After some preparation time we are finally online!
